first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively the same between the two evaluations. The minor differences in wording and ordering are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's skills or fit. The change in location from Berlin to Bangalore did not impact the evaluation.
